text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Ikuno Dictus looking around the<n>track by
herself.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If the starting gate is here, and the<n>audience will
be over there... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I've been tasked with organizing the<n>scrimmage
for this year's orientation,<n>so I'm doing some
preliminary<n>inspections for it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, but could you please move<n>from that
area? I need to measure the<n>track's width.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I assume that is why I was<n>entrusted with
this duty.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Orientations are not the time to cut<n>any corners.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I still have much to do, so if you'll<n>excuse me...
choice_data_list: You're going to do this all by yourself?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I alone was given this task. Once<n>I have a
lay of the situation, the rest of<n>my work should
be easy.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite her confident claim, it still<n>seems like a
lot of work for one<n>person. I'm about to offer to
help,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on, Ikuno! Are you seriously<n>trying to
do everything by yourself<n>again?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Didn't we tell you to let us know if<n>you needed
help?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one who wasentrusted with this—

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, yeah. But three heads are<n>better than one,
and we'll finish<n>quicker too!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Very well. Then can you two start<n>taking these
flags and...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Ah... My apologies. I have to instruct<n>them on
what to do, so I must take my<n>leave.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to get a good idea of the<n>audience's
view from the bleachers,<n>so please stand in the
front and back<n>corners and wave your flags.
After<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus seems to be very<n>well-liked by her
friends. It appears<n>my services aren't needed
after all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course. There's never a<n>reason not to be.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
The general public will also be<n>present during the
orientation.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And in the audience will surely be<n>Umamusume
who will one day be<n>among our members.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I want those future Tracen students<n>to have a
relaxing and enjoyable<n>experience here.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But that is not the only reason.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If we consider that this orientation is a<n>local event
meant for the whole<n>community to enjoy, it's
imperative to<n>design it to be accessible to all...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I learn a lot about how much goes into<n>making
such an event fun... as well as<n>how passionate
Ikuno Dictus is about<n>this orientation.
